scripts.test:spec: cross-env DB_PATH=backend/test.sqlite mocha tests/api/spec --reporter mocha-junit-reporter --reporter-options mochaFile=reports/spec.xml --timeout 60000
scripts.test:flaky: cross-env DB_PATH=backend/test.sqlite mocha tests/api/flaky --reporter mocha-junit-reporter --reporter-options mochaFile=reports/flaky.xml --timeout 5000
